name: Ravashack the Necromancer

effects:
Summons one non-[[Champion]] [[Hero]] to your [[Summoning Circle]]. The summoned Hero is chosen at random from all living, non-[[Champion]] Heroes whom are not currently in your employ.

You may freely hire or dismiss the summoned Hero. Summoned Heros do not request payment for hiring, but do have an [[Upkeep Cost]].
name: Summon Hero
